results.criterion: After first Wall click, preview line is visible from origin to mouse
Preview endpoint updates on every mousemove across direction changes
Preview uses existing wall styling and consistent on-screen thickness across zoom
Second click creates exactly one committed wall and clears preview
Escape or changing tools clears preview without adding/persisting an element
results.detail: escape: had=true cleared=true noAdd=true; tool: had=true cleared=true noAdd=true

results.criterion: Wall shorter than 4px minimum is not committed
results.detail: elementCount before=1 after=1 (preview leftover cancelled via Escape)

results.criterion: Shared Line tool preview also follows the cursor continuously
